I have a good overview: UPX-packed executable, 2 domains resolved (faithmentoringandmore.com, intarefc.com), 2 dropped files, 1 process created, no persistence keys, no unique IPs. The registry change

Network activity shows two DNS lookups: faithmentoringandmore.com (resolved to 184.168.221.86) and intarefc.com (no resolution). No HTTP traffic or IP connections. Now I need to examine the dropped fi
